title: Review: vault put/get symmetry, docs, and zeroization cleanup
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the refactor is self-contained to the vault backend, the new behavior is clearly documented, and the footgun warning is prominent. The only new surface is put-without-field accepting JSON, which is symmetric with get.
Confidence: 90% no missed production bug. The race condition is in tests, not production code. Main uncertainty: I haven't tested whether vaultrs kv2::set accepts an empty Map (put({})); if it does, get() would then fail with DecodeFailed — not reviewed per the stored memory guideline (speculative without live test). Would raise confidence if: integration suite run with parallel-test race fix in place.
